memoryArtifacts.headline: How Owen and Margery met
memoryArtifacts.description: Story passed down the family, my Dad told this to me:  Margery Browne and Owen O'Sullivan. Owen were on the same ship crossing, he was much older. She was a stowaway.  He protected her. She was a rema …

popularStory.headline: How Owen and Margery met
popularStory.description: Story passed down the family, my Dad told this to me:  Margery Browne and Owen O'Sullivan. Owen were on the same ship crossing, he was much older. She was a stowaway.  He protected her. She was a rema …

zh.lifeSummary: John Owen Sullivan是Major Phillip O'Sullivan和Johanna McCarthy的兒子，於1692年6月17日出生在愛爾蘭蒙斯特。他於大約1735年與Margaret or Margery Browne在美國新罕布夏州結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1795年6月20日在美國緬因州約克貝維其可享年103歲，埋葬在美國新罕布夏州斯特拉福德達勒姆沙利文 派利 布利亞爾 格洛德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: John Owen Sullivan是Major Phillip O'Sullivan和Johanna McCarthy的儿子，于1692年6月17日出生在爱尔兰蒙斯特。他于大约1735年与Margaret or Margery Browne在美国新罕布什尔州结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1795年6月20日在美国缅因州約克貝維其可享年103岁，埋葬在美国新罕布什尔州斯特拉福德達勒姆沙利文 派利 布利亞爾 格洛德。

nameMeanings.name: Sullivan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Liam, Donal, James Patrick, Michael Patrick, Aileen, Brigid, Paddy, Siobhan, John Patrick, Kevin Patrick, Parnell.
Irish (Cork and Kerry): shortened form of   O'Sullivan  .

variants.name: O'Sullivan
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Donal, Liam, Siobhan, Declan, Kieran, Cathal, Dermot, Eamon, Fergus, Grainne, Seamus.
Irish (Munster): Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Súileabháin ‘descendant of Súileabhán’, a personal name from súil ‘eye’ + dubh ‘dark’ + the diminutive suffix -án. Compare Sullivan .

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

nameMeanings.name: Owen
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Modern form of the Welsh name Owain or a transferred use of the surname derived from the personal name. It is also used as an Anglicized form of Gaelic Eóghan (see Scottish and Irish appendices), which is probably ultimately a cognate of the Welsh name. Although retaining its Welsh flavour, this is one of a number of Celtic names which have recently come into general use and have become increasingly popular since the 1990s.

en.lifeSummary: John Owen Sullivan was born on 17 June 1692, in Munster, Ireland as the son of Major Phillip O'Sullivan and Johanna McCarthy. He married Margaret or Margery Browne about 1735, in New Hampshire, United States. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 20 June 1795, in Berwick, York, Maine, United States, at the age of 103, and was buried in Sullivan Family Burial Ground, Durham, Strafford, New Hampshire, United States.

fr.lifeSummary: John Owen Sullivan est né le 17 juin 1692, à Munster, Irlande, fils de Major Phillip O'Sullivan et Johanna McCarthy. Il a épousé Margaret or Margery Browne environ 1735, à New Hampshire, États-Unis. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 20 juin 1795, à Berwick, York, Maine, États-Unis, à l’âge de 103 ans, et a été enterré à Sullivan Family Burial Ground, Durham, Strafford, New Hampshire, États-Unis.

de.lifeSummary: John Owen Sullivan wurde am 17. Juni 1692 in Munster, Irland, als Sohn von Major Phillip O'Sullivan und Johanna McCarthy geboren. Er hat um 1735 in New Hampshire, Vereinigte Staaten Margaret or Margery Browne geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 20. it.lifeSummary: John Owen Sullivan è nato il il 17 giugno 1692 nel Munster, Irlanda come figlio di Major Phillip O'Sullivan e Johanna McCarthy. Lui sposato Margaret or Margery Browne circa 1735, nel New Hampshire, Stati Uniti d'America. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 20 giugno 1795, nel Berwick, York, Maine, Stati Uniti d'America, all'età di 103 anni, e fu sepolto a Sullivan Family Burial Ground, Durham, Strafford, New Hampshire, Stati Uniti d'America.

ja.lifeSummary: John Owen Sullivanは1692年6月17日にアイルランドムンスターでMajor Phillip O'SullivanとJohanna McCarthyの息子として生まれた。約1735年にアメリカ合衆国ニューハンプシャー州でMargaret or Margery Browneと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1795年6月20日にアメリカ合衆国メイン州ヨークバーウィックで103歳で死去し，アメリカ合衆国ニューハンプシャー州ストラフォードダルハムスリヴァン ファミリー ブリアル グロウンドにて埋葬された。

ko.Sullivan Family Burial Ground, Durham, S: 미국 뉴햄프셔 주 스트래퍼드 뒤람 설리반 파밀리 버이앨 그라운드
ko.lifeSummary: John Owen Sullivan(은)는 1692년 6월 17일 아일랜드 먼스터에서 Major Phillip O'Sullivan(와)과 Johanna McCarthy의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 대략 1735년 미국 뉴햄프셔 주에서 Margaret or Margery Browne(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1795년 6월 20일 미국 메인 주 요르크 버윅에서 103세의 나이로 사망했으며 미국 뉴햄프셔 주 스트래퍼드 뒤람 설리반 파밀리 버이앨 그라운드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: John Owen Sullivan nasceu em 17 de junho de 1692, em Munster, Irlanda filho de Major Phillip O'Sullivan e Johanna McCarthy. Ele casou-se com Margaret or Margery Browne aproximadamente 1735, em Nova Hampshire, Estados Unidos da América. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 20 de junho de 1795, em Berwick, York, Maine, Estados Unidos da América, com 103 anos, e foi sepultado em Sullivan Family Burial Ground, Durham, Strafford, Nova Hampshire, Estados Unidos da América.

ru.Sullivan Family Burial Ground, Durham, S: сулливан фамили буряль гроунд, дурам, страффорд, Нью-Гэмпшир, Соединенные штаты
ru.lifeSummary: John Owen Sullivan родился 17 июня 1692 г. в местности мунстир, Ирландия. Его родителей звали Major Phillip O'Sullivan и Johanna McCarthy. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret or Margery Browne около 1735 г. в местности Нью-Гэмпшир, Соединенные штаты. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 2 дочери. Он умер 20 июня 1795 г. в местности бирвикк, ерк, Мэн, Соединенные штаты в возрасте 103 лет и был похоронен в местности сулливан фамили буряль гроунд, дурам, страффорд, Нью-Гэмпшир, Соединенные штаты.

es.lifeSummary: John Owen Sullivan nació el 17 de junio de 1692, en Munster, Irlanda como hijo de Major Phillip O'Sullivan y Johanna McCarthy. Se casó con Margaret or Margery Browne aproximadamente 1735, en Nuevo Hampshire, Estados Unidos. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 20 de junio de 1795, en Berwick, York, Maine, Estados Unidos, a la edad de 103 años, y fue sepultado en Sullivan Family Burial Ground, Durham, Strafford, Nuevo Hampshire, Estados Unidos.
